# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects before making outbound requests.
# Category: ssrf

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import axios, { AxiosRequestConfig } from 'axios';
import * as cheerio from 'cheerio';
import { URL } from 'url';
import * as dns from 'dns';
import { promisify } from 'util';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const dnsLookup = promisify(dns.lookup);

const ALLOWED_DOMAINS = [
  'example.com',
  'trusted-site.com',
  'youtube.com',
  'twitter.com',
  'github.com',
  'medium.com',
  'stackoverflow.com'
];

const PRIVATE_IP_RANGES = [
  /^10\./,
  /^172\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[0-1])\./,
  /^192\.168\./,
  /^127\./,
  /^169\.254\./,
  /^::1$/,
  /^fe80:/,
  /^fc00:/,
  /^fd00:/,
  /^localhost$/i
];

function isPrivateIP(ip: string): boolean {
  return PRIVATE_IP_RANGES.some(range => range.test(ip));
}

function isAllowedDomain(hostname: string): boolean {
  return ALLOWED_DOMAINS.some(allowed => {
    return hostname === allowed || hostname.endsWith(`.${allowed}`);
  });
}

async function validateURL(urlString: string): Promise<void> {
  let parsedURL: URL;
  
  try {
    parsedURL = new URL(urlString);
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error('Invalid URL format');
  }

  if (parsedURL.protocol !== 'http:' && parsedURL.protocol !== 'https:') {
    throw new Error('Only HTTP and HTTPS protocols are allowed');
  }

  if (!isAllowedDomain(parsedURL.hostname)) {
    throw new Error('Domain not in allowlist');
  }

  try {
    const { address } = await dnsLookup(parsedURL.hostname);
    
    if (isPrivateIP(address)) {
      throw new Error('Private IP addresses are not allowed');
    }
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof Error && error.message === 'Private IP addresses are not allowed') {
      throw error;
    }
    throw new Error('DNS lookup failed');
  }
}

function extractMetadata(html: string): { title: string; description: string } {
  const $ = cheerio.load(html);
  
  let title = $('meta[property="og:title"]').attr('content') ||
              $('meta[name="twitter:title"]').attr('content') ||
              $('title').text() ||
              '';
  
  let description = $('meta[property="og:description"]').attr('content') ||
                    $('meta[name="twitter:description"]').attr('content') ||
                    $('meta[name="description"]').attr('content') ||
                    '';
  
  title = title.trim().substring(0, 200);
  description = description.trim().substring(0, 500);
  
  return { title, description };
}

app.post('/api/link-preview', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const url: string = req.body.url;
    
    if (!url || typeof url !== 'string') {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'URL is required and must be a string' });
    }

    await validateURL(url);

    const axiosConfig: AxiosRequestConfig = {
      method: 'GET',
      url: url,
      timeout: 10000,
      maxRedirects: 3,
      maxContentLength: 5 * 1024 * 1024,
      headers: {
        'User-Agent': 'LinkPreviewBot/1.0'
      },
      validateStatus: (status) => status >= 200 && status < 300,
      beforeRedirect: async (options, responseDetails) => {
        if (options.hostname) {
          try {
            if (!isAllowedDomain(options.hostname)) {
              throw new Error('Redirect to non-allowlisted domain blocked');
            }
            
            const { address } = await dnsLookup(options.hostname);
            if (isPrivateIP(address)) {
              throw new Error('Redirect to private IP blocked');
            }
          } catch (error) {
            throw error;
          }
        }
      }
    };

    const response = await axios.get(url, axiosConfig);
    
    const contentType = response.headers['content-type'] || '';
    if (!contentType.includes('text/html')) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'URL does not return HTML content' });
    }

    const metadata = extractMetadata(response.data);

    return res.json({
      url: url,
      title: metadata.title,
      description: metadata.description
    });

  } catch (error) {
    if (axios.isAxiosError(error)) {
      if (error.code === 'ECONNABORTED') {
        return res.status(408).json({ error: 'Request timeout' });
      }
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch URL' });
    }
    
    if (error instanceof Error) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: error.message });
    }
    
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`Server running on port ${PORT}`);
});

export default app;
